system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan_search3","body":"CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_DINHMUC_GOVAN_SEARCH3] (@hehang       NVARCHAR (200),
                                             @masp         NVARCHAR (200),
                                             @tensp        NVARCHAR (200),
                                             @chitiet      NVARCHAR (200),
                                             @nguyenlieu   NVARCHAR (200),
                                             @PageNumber   INT,
                                             @PageSize     INT= 50)
AS
DECLARE @Start   INT, @End     INT
SET @Start = (((@PageNumber - 1) * @PageSize) + 1)
SET @End = (@Start + @PageSize - 1)


SELECT B.tensp,
       B.hehang,
       a.id,
       a.pcode,
       a.c_level,
       a.masp,
       b.masp_nhamay,
       a.mact,
       a.stt,
       a.chitiet,
       a.nguyenlieu,
       a.chatluong,
       a.[long],
       a.loainguyenlieu,
       a.dayy_tc,
       a.rong_tc,
       a.dai_tc,
       a.soluong_tc,
       a.m3_tc,
       a.dayy_sc,
       a.rong_sc,
       a.dai_sc,
       a.soluong_sc,
       a.m3_sc,
       a.dayy_phoi,
       a.cachlayphoi,
       a.ghichu,
       a.quytrinhgiacong,
       a.hinhanh,
       a.hoanthanh,
       a.ngaytao,
       a.nguoitao,
       a.nguoisua,
       a.ngaysua,
       a.maspid,
       a.maspmasp,
       a.soluong_mong,
       a.kichthuoc_mong,
       a.mong1,
       a.mong2,
       a.veneer_matchinh,
       a.veneer_matphu,
       a.veneer_canhngan,
       a.veneer_canhdai,
       a.selection,
       a.uv_mat1,
       a.uv_mat2,
       a.uv_canh1,
       a.uv_canh2,
       a.uv_dau1,
       a.uv_dau2,
       a.m2_tc,
       a.thoigian,
       a.uv_code,
       a.uv_quytrinh,
       a.bemat,
       a.chitiet_ghep,
       a.chitiet_ghep2,
       a.ObjectType,
       a.phoi_ghep,
       a.somat_giacong,
       a.t_sort,
       a.cum_trai,
       a.cum_phai,
       a.cum_truoc,
       a.cum_sau,
       a.cum_dinh,
       a.cum_day,
       a.IsChiTietRoi,
	  a.son_mat1,
	  a.son_mat2,
	  a.son_canh1,
	  a.son_canh2,
	  a.son_dau1,
	  a.son_dau2,
	  a.m2_son
FROM (SELECT a.*, ROW_NUMBER () OVER (ORDER BY a.id) AS RowNum
      FROM tr_dinhmuc_govan a INNER JOIN tr_sanpham b ON a.masp = b.masp
      WHERE     ISNULL (a.mact, '') <> '000'
            AND CASE WHEN LEN (@hehang) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE CHARINDEX (@hehang, B.hehang) END > 0
            AND CASE WHEN LEN (@masp) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE CHARINDEX (@masp, A.masp) END > 0
            AND CASE WHEN LEN (@tensp) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE CHARINDEX (@tensp, B.tensp) END > 0
            AND CASE WHEN LEN (@chitiet) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE CHARINDEX (@chitiet, A.chitiet) END > 0
            AND CASE WHEN LEN (@nguyenlieu) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE CHARINDEX (@nguyenlieu, ISNULL (A.nguyenlieu, '')) END > 0
          ) a
     INNER JOIN tr_sanpham B ON A.masp = B.masp
WHERE a.RowNum BETWEEN @Start AND @End AND B.active = 1","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_sanpham"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-window"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
